# `request.lowerTf`

> **Stability:** stable
> **Since:** 0.6

Read lower-timeframe bars contained by each main-stream bar.

## Signature

```ts
lowerTf(_opts: RequestLowerTfOpts): Series<ReadonlyArray<Bar>> {
    return sentinel("request.lowerTf");
}
```

## Example

```ts
const fn: typeof request.lowerTf = request.lowerTf;
    void fn;
```
